channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: The AI skills gap is here, says AI company, and power users are pulling ahead
item.description: Anthropic finds AI isn’t replacing jobs yet, but early data shows growing inequality as experienced users gain an edge, raising concerns about future displacement and workforce divides.

item.title: Ring Launches a 4K Video Doorbell That Runs on Battery
item.description: The Video Doorbell Pro, along with three new 2K wired and battery options, will come with a Ring AI Pro trial subscription.

item.title: Convicted spyware chief hints that Greece’s government was behind dozens of phone hacks
item.description: The spyware founder's comments are the most direct suggestion yet from anyone inside Intellexa that the Mitsotakis government authorized the hacking of dozens of phones belonging to senior Greek government ministers, opposition leaders, military officials, and journalists.

item.title: The portable Fanttik X9 Pro tire inflator is down to its best price in months
item.description: If you’ve ever had to deal with a flat tire, you know how quickly it can derail your day. That’s why it’s worth considering a portable inflator like the Fanttik X9 Pro. The small, rechargeable air pump that can quickly inflate tires on cars and bikes is down to $59.98 ($20 off) at Amazon and […]

item.title: PSA: T-Mobile customers have a week to sign up for a free year of MLB.TV
item.description: Today marks the start of the 2026 baseball season and in what has sort of become an annual tradition, T-Mobile is once again offering a free subscription to MLB.TV.In order to take advantage of the deal, T-Mobile customers simply need to log into the T Life app, navigate to the Benefits tab and then hit Redeem after clicking the banner for a free season of MLB.TV. From there, you just need to download the latest version of the MLB app to your mobile device and sign in or create an account. That said, this is a time-limited offer, so if you want the ability to stream regular season baseball for...

item.title: Meta is laying off hundreds of employees as it pours money into AI
item.description: Meta is laying off hundreds of employees across its company, according to reports from The New York Times, NBC News, and The Information. The job cuts impact workers on Meta's recruiting, social media, and sales teams, along with Reality Labs, the division that develops the company's smart glasses and virtual reality headsets. "Teams across Meta […]...

item.title: Jury rules against Meta and YouTube in social media addiction case
item.description: A jury in Los Angeles has found that Meta and YouTube were negligent in a closely-watched trial over social media addiction. The companies were ordered to pay $6 million in damages to the woman who said she was harmed by their addictive features as a child.The case was brought by a 20-year-old woman, named in court documents as “K.G.M,” who sued Meta, YouTube, TikTok and Snap, saying that she had been harmed by the platforms as a child due to addictive features. TikTok and Snap reached a settlement ahead of the trial. According to NBC News, Meta was ordered to pay 70 percent of the $3 million ...

item.title: Spotify is letting artists manually approve releases to combat AI fakes
item.description: Spotify is beta-testing a new feature called Artist Profile Protection that lets artists review releases before they go live. Sometimes songs end up on the wrong artist pages because of metadata mixups or shared names. But increasingly, artists have been targeted by impostors and AI-generated fakes. Profile Protection offers a buffer against bad actors. Everyone […]...

item.title: One of the Best Scenes in ‘Project Hail Mary’ Wasn’t in the Script
item.description: Sandra Hüller's memorable moment on the mic was a last-minute addition.

item.title: Forget the RAM crisis — storage prices are spiralling, and processors could be next, as gaming PC maker warns 'CPU shortage is getting more serious'
item.description: The cost of all key PC components is being hit, as apparently, CPUs are now in the firing line.

item.title: Who’s driving Waymo’s self-driving cars? Sometimes, the police.
item.description: First responders have had to take control of Waymo vehicles and move them during emergency situations, including in at least two active crime scenes, TechCrunch found.

item.title: Google unveils TurboQuant, a new AI memory compression algorithm — and yes, the internet is calling it ‘Pied Piper’
item.description: Google’s TurboQuant has the internet joking about Pied Piper from HBO's "Silicon Valley." The compression algorithm promises to shrink AI’s “working memory” by up to 6x, but it’s still just a lab experiment for now.

item.title: Razer’s new Blade 16 gaming laptop has an Intel Panther Lake chip and very fast RAM
item.description: Razer is giving its Blade 16 gaming laptop a speed and battery boost for 2026. The high-end gaming laptop keeps the same thin chassis and RTX 50-series GPU options as last year's model, but it's now making the switch from AMD to an Intel Core Ultra 9 386H "Panther Lake" chip, and corresponding faster RAM. […]

item.title: HBO Max's Harry Potter series premieres this Christmas
item.description: HBO released a teaser trailer and premiere date for its take on Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone. The show will premiere on the HBO Max streaming network this December 25. It's a rare case where a big-ticket project is coming out earlier than anticipated instead of later; the series wasn't expected to arrive until 2027. HBO has already proved its bona fides with lush adaptations of fantastical stories several times over, and this trailer looks like more of the same. The team behind the camera includes notable names who have worked on series such as Succession, Game of Thrones, The Last...

item.title: Webb and Hubble telescopes combine forces for a new view of Saturn
item.description: The ESA, NASA and CSA have released new images of Saturn captured by the James Webb and Hubble space telescopes that offer an unprecedented view of the gas giant's atmosphere. Particularly, comparing shots captured with Hubble against an infrared view from Webb highlights details in the composition and movement of Saturn's outer layers.The Hubble images were captured as part of the Outer Planet Atmosphere Legacy program in August 2024, while the Webb images were shot a few months later. "Both sense sunlight reflected from Saturn’s banded clouds and hazes," NASA says, "but where Hubble reveals ...

item.title: The surprise hit Nex Playground is the latest console to get a price hike
item.description: Everything about video games is getting more expensive, and soon that will include a budget-friendly console. The Nex Playground - a Kinect-like device aimed at families that made headlines by outselling the Xbox over the holidays last year - will cost $299 starting on April 1st, a $50 bump. In a statement on the Nex […]

item.title: Landmark case finds Meta, Google liable for addicting app design
item.description: A Los Angeles jury handed down an unprecedented win on Wednesday to a young woman who sued the companies for deliberately designing their apps to addict and harm children. A Los Angeles County jury on Wednesday found Meta and Google liable for harming a young woman who used their social media platforms.

item.title: Melania Trump brings humanoid robots to the White House
item.description: Melania Trump says robot teachers are the future, as she brings AI-powered robot to White House summit on education.

item.title: AI's got Talent: In a weird twist, someone just launched a marketplace for AI Agents that's not far off a human-powered job board
item.description: Agentalent.ai enables enterprises to post, evaluate, and hire AI agents while developers gain direct access to operational deployment.

item.title: The L.A. verdict could haunt social media platforms
item.description: A California court’s ruling on social media addiction could trigger more lawsuits and reshape how we treat platforms. Bellwether trials are complicated but consequential. Pulled from a morass of claims, they’re designed to test how a jury responds to a broader legal theory. Often, they fall flat.

item.title: Disney’s big bets on the metaverse and AI slop aren’t going so well
item.description: Less than a week into his tenure as Disney's newly-appointed CEO, Josh D'Amaro is already dealing with two separate crises that have cast a shadow over the company's future plans. OpenAI is shutting down its Sora image-generation program just months after Disney announced a $1 billion dollar collaboration to bake the tech into Disney Plus. […]

item.title: The best robot vacuum deals in Amazons Big Spring Sale: Our Dreame, Roborock, and Eufy favorites on sale
item.description: Top robot vacuums are on sale in Amazon's Big Spring Sale, like the Eufy C28 and Dreame X60 Max Ultra Complete.

item.title: What Eiichiro Oda Kept (and Cut) From the Original Manga Pilot of ‘One Piece’
item.description: 'Romance Dawn,' the one-shot blueprint for Oda's magnum opus, expands the world of 'One Piece' as intriguingly as Netflix's live-action series—just in reverse.

item.title: Google’s new Android Automotive update wants to control your car's 'brain' —as Micron predicts cars will soon need 300GB of RAM
item.description: Cars are rapidly turning into computers as Android Automotive update will soon make it the ‘brain’ of your car, but Micron says vehicles will soon need 300GB of RAM to function.

item.title: Wait! Did Grimes just join LinkedIn?
item.description: Last year the Canadian singer-songwriter said she’d only release her new music on the professional networking platform. A profile with her real name appeared on the site this week. “I’m only gonna be releasing music on LinkedIn from now on,” Grimes posted on X in February 2025.

item.title: How to watch Wales vs. Bosnia-Herzegovina online for free
item.description: How to watch World Cup qualifiers for free. Live stream Wales vs. Bosnia-Herzegovina in World Cup 2026 qualifiers for free.

item.title: How to watch Italy vs. Northern Ireland online for free
item.description: How to watch World Cup qualifiers for free. Live stream Italy vs. Northern Ireland in World Cup 2026 qualifiers for free.

item.title: How to watch Brazil vs. France online for free
item.description: How to watch live football for free. Live stream Brazil vs. France in a 2026 International Friendly for free.

item.title: How to watch Czechia vs. Ireland online for free
item.description: How to watch World Cup qualifiers for free. Live stream Czechia vs. Ireland in World Cup 2026 qualifiers for free.

item.title: Amazon Spring Sale Deal: The Typhur Dome 2 Air Fryer Is 30% Off
item.description: I tested more than 30 air fryers this past year. The Typhur Dome 2 is the one I recommend, and it’s uncommonly cheap right now.

item.title: Spring cleaning deals at Amazons spring sale: Save on kitchen, bathroom, and laundry supplies
item.description: Amazon's Big Spring Sale has cleaning deals to deep clean every room: Save on disinfectant sprays, shower scrubbers, vacuums, and more.
